summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Super Admin Catalog and Subscription Lifecycle features. All 11 backend API tests passed (1 skipped). All frontend pages verified working: Catalog page shows plans with modules/pricing/subscriber count, Create/Edit plan modal with module toggles and feature configuration, Subscriptions Lifecycle page shows all subscriptions with status badges, Quick actions (pause, reactivate) work from subscriptions table, Pause modal appears and allows reason input.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/superadmin/catalog/modules - returns list of 10 available modules (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/catalog/plans - returns list of plans (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/catalog/plans?include_inactive=true - includes inactive plans (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/catalog/plans - create new plan with modules and features (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/catalog/plans - duplicate code correctly rejected (400)
Backend: PUT /api/superadmin/catalog/plans/{id} - update plan (200)
Backend: DELETE /api/superadmin/catalog/plans/{id} - soft delete plan (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/subscriptions/list - list all subscriptions (200)
Backend: GET /api/superadmin/subscriptions/list?status=active - filter by status (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/subscriptions/{id}/pause - pause subscription (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/subscriptions/{id}/reactivate - reactivate paused subscription (200)
Backend: POST /api/superadmin/subscriptions/{id}/downgrade/check - downgrade compatibility check endpoint exists (200/404)
Frontend: /superadmin/catalog displays plan cards with modules, pricing, subscriber count
Frontend: Starter plan shows 79€/mois, 948€/an (-10%), 3 users max, 14 jours trial, PMS+CRM modules
Frontend: Business plan shows 199€/mois, 2388€/an (-15%), 15 users max, 30 jours trial, 12 mois engagement, PMS+Staff+CRM+Finance modules, 'Populaire' badge
Frontend: 'Nouveau Plan' button opens create modal with all form fields
Frontend: Create plan modal has module toggles (10 modules) with feature counts
Frontend: Edit plan modal pre-fills existing plan data correctly
Frontend: Edit plan modal shows enabled modules (PMS, CRM) with Switch toggles
Frontend: /superadmin/subscriptions displays stats cards (Total, Actifs, En essai, En pause, MRR)
Frontend: Subscriptions table shows hotel name, plan badge, status badge, users count, price, end date
Frontend: Status badges display correctly (Actif=green, Essai=blue, Annulé=gray)
Frontend: Pause button (amber) visible for active subscriptions
Frontend: Pause modal opens with hotel info, reason input, and confirm button
Frontend: Pause modal shows 'L'accès sera suspendu mais les données seront conservées. La facturation sera interrompue.'
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed plans during backend testing. Existing plans: Starter (79€/mois, PMS+CRM) and Business (199€/mois, PMS+Staff+CRM+Finance, featured).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog and Subscription Lifecycle features fully tested. Catalog page (/superadmin/catalog) shows plan cards with modules, pricing, trial days, commitment, subscriber count. Create/Edit modal has module toggles using Shadcn Switch components. Subscriptions Lifecycle page (/superadmin/subscriptions) shows all subscriptions (legacy+new format merged) with status badges, quick actions (pause/reactivate), and filters. Pause/Reactivate flow works correctly. Downgrade check endpoint exists but requires subscription in sa_subscriptions collection (new format).

catalog_modules_api.returns: 10 modules: pms, staff, channel_manager, crm, rms, e_reputation, operations, booking_engine, finance, marketing

catalog_page.plan_cards: Shows name, code, description, pricing (monthly/annual with discount), max users, trial days, commitment, subscriber count, modules list
catalog_page.create_modal: Form fields: name, code, description, price_monthly, price_annual, annual_discount_percent, max_users, trial_days, commitment_months, is_active, is_featured, modules with feature toggles
catalog_page.edit_modal: Same as create but pre-filled, code field disabled

subscriptions_lifecycle_page.pause_modal: Shows hotel info, reason input, confirm button
